title: Bee Removal in Kingsbridge, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Kingsbridge, Bronx. Safe, humane bee extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Kingsbridge? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, professional bee removal services throughout this historic Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians specialize in humane bee extraction from residential and commercial properties, ensuring your family and neighbors stay protected.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Kingsbridge's diverse mix of pre-war apartments, row houses, and local businesses, we understand the unique pest challenges of this Northwest Bronx community. Our bee removal experts respond quickly, work efficiently, and guarantee complete hive extraction at competitive rates from $350 to $550.
localContext: From the bustling Kingsbridge Road shopping corridor to the residential streets near Van Cortlandt Park, bee colonies often establish themselves in building overhangs, chimneys, and wall cavities common in Kingsbridge's early 20th-century architecture. The neighborhood's tree-lined blocks and proximity to green spaces make it particularly attractive to swarming bees during spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Kingsbridge property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal service throughout Kingsbridge. Our team typically arrives within 2-4 hours for emergency situations and can complete most residential bee removals in a single visit, depending on hive location and size.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal price?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes full inspection, safe bee and hive extraction, removal of honeycomb, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and proper sealing of entry points. Price varies based on hive size, location accessibility, and structural modifications needed.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are vital pollinators. Our technicians carefully extract the hive and relocate colonies to safe apiaries. Extermination is only used when relocation isn't feasible due to aggressive species or structural safety concerns.

faqs.question: Are bees common in Kingsbridge apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kingsbridge's many pre-war apartment buildings with brick facades, old ventilation systems, and roof access provide ideal nesting spots for bees. We frequently service buildings along Kingsbridge Avenue, Sedgwick Avenue, and the surrounding residential blocks, particularly during spring swarming season from April through June.
